title: Numeric Feature Distributions
objective: Inspect univariate distributions for key numeric clinical predictors.
method: Generated histograms/density overlays for age, resting blood pressure, cholesterol, maximum heart rate, and oldpeak.
results: Median maximum heart rate is 140.0 bpm.
warnings: Missing values and site-level sampling differences may affect all estimates.
Cholesterol and blood-pressure zeros were excluded in clean numeric summaries.
